All Round-1 matched items remain intact: mediation.py restoration/residual/proportion with 1000-resample paired bootstrap seed=0, sorted-intersection sample_id pairing, alphabetical tie-break on claim-eligible conditions, CLI flags, MANDATED_CAVEAT byte-exact, FORBIDDEN_PHRASES_PHASE_B/PHASE_C tuples, check_artifacts_for_forbidden phrases= kwarg, post_analysis CONDITION_NAME_PREFIXES + _enumerate_conditions with legacy-order byte-identity, np.float32 casts, np.random.seed + default_rng determinism, upstream_provenance SHA-256
extra: --config flag (accept-and-logged-only) retained for cross-phase CLI parity; writer-agent hard rule satisfied. Non-harmful.
Accuracy cross-check tolerance 2e-3 vs spec §10's 1e-6 — documented deviation; now persisted as environment.acc_cross_check_tolerance so downstream readers see the relaxation.

FORBIDDEN_PHRASES_PHASE_C omits 'nie/nde' / 'nde/nie' literal tokens because they collide case-insensitively with the mandated caveat ('NIE/NDE decomposition'); spelled-out forms still blocked. Acceptable resolution of spec self-contradiction.

findings.claim: Unchanged from Round 1: module-level pytest.importorskip('torch') skips all 9 backward-compat tests when torch is unavailable. H3 byte-identical-ordering guard not exercised in writer's sandbox.
findings.evidence: Writer's Round-1 tests_run details reported '13 passed, 1 skipped'. Writer explicitly deferred (deferred_nits: watcher-finding-#2) with rationale that lifting _enumerate_conditions out of post_analysis.py would touch a pinned Phase A file whose legacy emission-order contract is already pinned by test_post_analysis_condition_names.py's byte-identical-ordering test.
findings.suggested_fix: Re-run stage1/tests/test_post_analysis_condition_names.py in a torch-enabled environment (Colab / GPU box) and attach the passing output. Non-blocking for writer handoff; CI/acceptance-smoke-test blocker only.

findings.claim: Unchanged from Round 1: summary.json is written twice (pre-gate then rewritten with gate results). Writer explicitly deferred (deferred_nits: watcher-finding-#5) as a defensive-and-correct pattern.
findings.evidence: Writer rationale: 'gate already reads summary.json as part of its contract; not worth refactor risk for pre-final-IO scan path.'
findings.suggested_fix: Accept as-is. Defensive pattern is fine.

can_ship_with_followup: Re-run stage1/tests/test_post_analysis_condition_names.py in a torch-enabled environment (Colab / GPU box) and attach the passing output to exercise H3 backward-compat (writer deferred-nit #2).
Consider Phase B spec errata to write unrounded accuracies so the acc_cross_check_tolerance can be tightened from 2e-3 to spec §10's 1e-6 — Phase B spec update, not a Phase C blocker.
